info.title: GitHub Agent Gateway
info.description: Vendor-neutral gateway for safely managing repositories selected through GitHub App installations from AI agents and automation clients. Clients should inspect gateway capabilities before choosing branch names or invoking write operations.

get.summary: Discover runtime capabilities and GitHub App installation access mode
get.description: Call this before write operations. Returns GitHub App installation access mode, branch policy, protected branches, generated branch prefix, limits, workflow allowlist and enabled feature flags. Repository names are intentionally omitted.

get.summary: List repositories selected in GitHub App installations
get.description: Returns repositories that the configured GitHub App installation or installations can access. GitHub installation repository selection is the authoritative access boundary.

patch.description: Disabled unless ENABLE_ADMIN_OPERATIONS=true. Exact confirmation: UPDATE owner/repository.

post.description: Creates a branch allowed by the effective branch policy. Call getCapabilities first. Direct writes to the repository default branch are never allowed.

delete.description: Deletes a non-default branch allowed by the effective branch policy. Requires destructive operations to be enabled and an exact confirmation phrase.

post.description: Does not modify GitHub. Returns a diff, base SHA, plan ID, branch and exact confirmation phrase.
Call only after showing the preview to the user and receiving explicit approval.

put.description: Disabled by default. Confirmation: MERGE owner/repository#number.

delete.description: Disabled by default. Confirmation: DELETE LABEL owner/repository name.

post.summary: Create a draft or published release

delete.description: Disabled by default. Confirmation: DELETE RELEASE owner/repository releaseId.

post.summary: Create a lightweight or annotated tag

delete.description: Disabled by default. Confirmation: UNPROTECT owner/repository branch.

put.description: Confirmation: INVITE username TO owner/repository AS permission.

delete.description: Disabled by default. Confirmation: REMOVE username FROM owner/repository.
Disabled by default. Confirmation: DELETE TAG owner/repository tag.

baseBranch.description: Branch or ref whose current head is used as the immutable base for the preview.

proposedBranch.description: Target branch. Omit to auto-generate a name using the configured generated prefix. When unrestricted mode is enabled, any safe non-protected, non-default branch name is accepted.
